what_it_does: Records a channel attachment entry that links an attachment ID to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file is YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares an attachment of type board_items targeting board://item-58ae9420.
It belongs to the dragnet-development channel and was added on 2026-06-23T06:19:36.603274+00:00.
standouts: Attachment target uses a board:// URI scheme.
The filename is derived from the attachment ID.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter metadata in a Markdown file.
Follows an id/channel/attachment_type/target/added schema for attachment records.
notes: This is a lightweight metadata stub that records when a board item was attached to a channel.
questions: What content or relationship semantics does board://item-58ae9420 represent?
Is the attachment_type board_items intended to be machine-processed into a board reference?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as a link record between a channel and a board item, matching its stated metadata purpose.
intention_signals: It tries to create a durable, timestamped association between a channel discussion artifact and a specific board item.
contribution: Provides a persistent, file-based record of a channel-to-board-item attachment with a stable ID and timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter Markdown file recording attachment att-67717640 in the dragnet-development channel linking to board item item-58ae9420.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a timestamped association between a channel and a board item for retrieval and traceability.
